Interface SecurityaccountJpaRepository

All Superinterfaces:
BaseRepositoryCustom<Securityaccount>, org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Securityaccount, Integer>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Securityaccount, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Securityaccount, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Securityaccount, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Securityaccount, Integer>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Securityaccount>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Securityaccount, Integer>, SecurityaccountJpaRepositoryCustom, UpdateCreateDeleteWithTenantJpaRepository<Securityaccount>, UpdateCreateJpaRepository<Securityaccount>
public interface SecurityaccountJpaRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Securityaccount, Integer>, SecurityaccountJpaRepositoryCustom, UpdateCreateDeleteWithTenantJpaRepository<Securityaccount>
